instruction: Explain the potential impact of this vulnerability.
input: A denial service vulnerability has been found on  Hex Workshop affecting version 6.7, an attacker could send a command line file arguments and control the Structured Exception Handler (SEH) records resulting in a service shutdown.
output: Exploitation of this vulnerability can lead to a Denial of Service (DoS), where the affected application becomes unresponsive or crashes, potentially disrupting service availability.
